title: J4Flag Function
parameters: point	Optional.  Point expression.  If point is omitted, then the J4Flag setting of the current robot position is returned.
description:
J4Flag Function

J4Flag Function

Returns the J4Flag attribute of a point.
see_also:
Elbow, Hand, Wrist, J4Flag Statement, J6Flag

J4Flag Function Example

Print J4Flag(pick)

Print J4Flag(P1)

Print J4Flag

Print J4Flag(Pallet(1, 1))
examples:
Print J4Flag(pick)

Print J4Flag(P1)

Print J4Flag

Print J4Flag(Pallet(1, 1))
